title: Module (Source)
description: Root configuration for a training module as it exists on disk (module/module.yaml). This schema validates the source file only - it does not include the full nested hierarchy of chapters, sections, and assessments. The module directory must contain module.yaml and description.md.

code.description: Unique identifier for this module. Must start and end with alphanumeric, can contain hyphens.

title.description: Display name for the module shown in the UI and module catalog.

shortDescription.description: Brief summary displayed on module cards in the catalog.

bannerImage.description: Header image URL displayed on the module landing page.

bannerVideo.description: Introductory video URL displayed on the module landing page. Optional - omit or leave empty if the module has no video.

tags.description: Array of categorization tags for the module. At least one tag is required.

video.description: Optional URL to a module overview or introduction video.

examples.title: Path to Production
examples.shortDescription: Master the practices and tools for reliably delivering software to production.
